title: caladenia attingens subsp. attingens
intro: Caladenia attingens subsp. attingens is a rare and endangered Australian orchid species, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Caladenia genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Caladenia attingens subsp. attingens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or tinctures, and its extracts are used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various health conditions.
